special_mechanics.name: Jetpack Flight
special_mechanics.description: Stone (pilot character) is equipped with a jetpack that enables flight similar to the Nitro suit but slower. Used when ejected from mech suits.

special_mechanics.name: Suit Abandonment/Ejection
special_mechanics.description: Player can eject from their mech suit at any time or when it is almost completely destroyed, allowing Stone to survive and find a new suit. Enables access to smaller spaces.

physics_values.vulnerability: Stone can be instantly killed by powerful enemy fire

special_mechanics.name: Mech Suit Switching
special_mechanics.description: Six different assault suits available: Nitro, Havoc, Prometheus, Spider, Ballistic, and Drache. Each has distinctive mechanics and melee weapons. Multiple suits can be used in the same stage.

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/Qualitative. No quantitative movement physics data documented in available sources. Game is a run-and-gun action platformer with mecha suit mechanics. Sources contain only high-level gameplay descriptions and ROM debugging information.
